verses.text: Tua ciangin Deborah leh Abinoam' tapa Barak in tua ni-in la sa uh a
“Makaite in Israel-te makai uh a, mite amau mahmah utna tawh kipia uh hi. Topa phat un
Ngai un, kumpite aw, na bil uh ngat un, uliante aw. Topa tungah la ka sa ding a, Israel-te' Pasian, Topa' tungah la ngaih ka sa ding hi
Topa aw, Seir panin na paikhiat ciang, Edom gam panin na paikhiat ciang, leitung ling a, vantung panin guah zu hi. Hi hi, meiite in tui hong khia a
Topa' mai-ah mualte kiling hi, Israel Pasian, Topa' mai Sinai galkhatah
“Anath' tapa Shamgar' hun lai, Jael' hun lai-in, a hon hona khualzinte om nawnlo a, khualzinte lam gei-ah pial uh hi
Israel sunga lo khote khawlcip uh a, bangmah sem theilo uh hi. Nang, Deborah, nong khan' mateng, Israel sungah nu banga nong khan' mateng
A thak pasian-te a kiteel ciangin, kulhkongpi sungah gal om pah hi. Lum ahi a, tei ahi zongin, Israel tul sawmlite lakah kimu ahi hiam
Mite lak panin utna tawh amau a kipia tawm Israel a ukte' lamah ka lungsim pai hi. Topa phat un
“A thu gen un, no la puang tungah a tuangte, sualphah puanhoih tungah a tute leh lampi-ah a paite aw
Tui phuala lasakna a tumte' gin'na in Topa' gualzawhna gen a, Israel sunga lo khote in zong a gualzawhna mah genkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa' mite kulhkongpite-ah paisuk uh hi
“Khanglo in, khanglo in, Deborah! Khanglo in, khanglo in, la khat sa in! Tho in, Barak, na galmatte paikhiatpih in, Abinoam' tapa aw
Tua ciangin ulianpa' mi a omlaite paisuk uh a, ama-a' ding a dosak dingin Topa' mite paisuk uh hi
Efraim panin amaute dingkhia-in tua kuamah pai uh a, nang, Benjamin, na behte tawh hong zui uh hi. Makhir panin a ukte hong paisukin, Zebulun panin ulianpa' ciangkhut a tawite hong paisuk uh hi
Issakhar uliante Deborah tawh hong pai a, Barak tungah Issakhar thuman hi. Kuam sung ama khe phungah amaute kituah uh hi. Reuben behte lakah nakpi taka lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi
Bang hangin tuukhawkte lakah tuuhonte-a' dingin tamngai kitum a ngai dingin zekai na hi hiam? Reuben behte lakah nakpi taka lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi
Jordan galkhatah Gilead om hi. Dan minamte bang hangin teembaw tawh om ahi hiam? Asher minamte, tuipi gei-ah tu lai a, leilak a tun'na gei-ah a teng uh hi
Zebulun mite a sih dongun gal sungah a kipia ngam mi hi a, Naftali minamte zong, gamlak a sangna munah tua bangmah ahi hi
“Kumpite hong pai-in do uh hi. Tua ciangin Kanaan kumpite in Megiddo tuite' gei, Taanak-ah do uh a, amaute in a kinusia ngunte ngahlo uh hi
Vantung panin aksite in do uh a, amau paina ciat panin Sisera do uh hi
Kishon guntui khang in amaute tai a, a leeng vanvan tuikhang, Kishon tuikhang in tai hi. Thakhauh takin mai nawtsuak ding
Tua ciangin sakol khe, a kop taina, a sakol hangte' koptaina a ging hi
“ Topa' vantung mi in, ‘Meroz khua samsia in, a sunga teng mite nasia takin samsia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a huh dingin a thahatpa dona-ah Topa a huh dingin hong kuanlo uh hi,’ a ci hi
“Numeite lakah thupha ngah phapen Jael, Ken mi Heber' zi, puanbukah a teng numei lak pan thupha ngah phapen ahi hi
Sisera in tui ngen a, Jael in bawngnawi pia hi. Ulian hai sungah tuanu in bawngnawi thaukhal paipih hi
Amah in puanbuk khetphim a khutin zam a, a taklam khutin nasemte' khetbuk a zam hi. Sisera khatvei sat a, a lutang satkhamin, amah in phelkhamin a paang a sun hi
Amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. Tuanu' khe kiangah amah taangloin om hi. Ama khe phungah amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. A tukna munah, amah a si-in puk hi

“Tawlet panin Sisera' nu khuadak a, a kikalh simsiam kawm panin Sisera' nu khuadak hi: ‘Bang hangin a leeng hong ciah ding hih tanvei sawt ahi hiam? A leeng khegingte bang hangin hici zekai ahi hiam?’ a ci hi
A numeite a pilpennu in amah a dawng hiam, dawnglo hi. Amah leh amah kidawng a

‘Amaute in vankinusiate mu-in hawm hilo ahi hiam? Mi khat ciangin nungak khat ahih kei leh nih pai; a kinusia puan kinimte Sisera-a' ding, a kinusia puan kinim a kizemte, a kinim a kizem puan nihte ka ngawng-a ding maw?’ a ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin na gal khempeuh si khin uh hi, Topa! Ahih hangin na lawmte pen a vangliatna tawh a suak ni bang ta hen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam in kum sawmli sung tawlngakna hun a nei hi.
